title: 1.1: Bootstrap seeder + Makefile
description:
## Scope
Single feature for iteration 1.1. Adds tsx + @supabase/supabase-js as devDeps, creates scripts/seed-supabase.ts with local-URL guard + clean-DB precondition + smoke-test insert, adds make seed target. No CRM data, no auth users yet.

- Append learnings to context-log.md when done
